name: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk
summary: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk operates in the paper packaging industry in Indonesia, Asia, North and South America, Australia, Africa, and Europe. The company offers white grade papers, brown grade papers, and carton boxes, as well as offset printing services. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Serang, Indonesia. PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Purinusa Ekapersada.
